## Code Quality Checklist

<!-- Go through this checklist before marking your PR as ready -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (Swift 5.9, MVVM pattern)
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have checked for compiler warnings (especially Swift 6 concurrency)
- [ ] If adding new files, I've added them to `project.yml` (not Xcode directly)
- [ ] I have run `xcodegen generate` after any project structure changes
- [ ] For UI changes: I have tested in both Light and Dark mode
- [ ] For new features: I have considered accessibility (VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, etc.)

## Manual Testing Checklist (if applicable)

- [ ] App launches without crashes
- [ ] Affected features work as expected
- [ ] No regressions in existing functionality
- [ ] Progress saves correctly (if applicable)
- [ ] Search works correctly (if applicable)
